summary: Added voronoi cellular fragment shader (voronoiCell.frag.glsl) that computes a 2D voronoi distance field from gl_PointCoord, creating a stained-glass/cracked-ice look. Bass energy stretches cells larger, treble energy sharpens edge cracks. Color uses palette-derived vColor with darkened cool-shift edges. Depth fog matches existing pointWarp pattern. Wired into pointCloud.ts as an alternative fragment shader via useVoronoiShader config flag, driven by enableVoronoiCells in QualityProfile (false for low tier, true for medium/high). Added uVoronoiGridSize uniform modulated by structureComplexity (range 3.0–6.0). All 16 new tests pass, full suite (1276 tests) passes, build succeeds.
